title: ChatRoom — WebSockets + persistent counter + idle cleanup

vars.spec: Build a Durable Object named `ChatRoom` for a multi-room real-time chat backend on Cloudflare Workers. (1) Accept WebSocket upgrades at /room/:name/ws and broadcast every incoming text message to all clients in that room. (2) Keep a persistent count of messages sent in the room that survives hibernation and eviction; expose it at GET /room/:name/count. (3) After 30 minutes with no messages, delete all room state and disconnect clients. Each room name maps to its own DO instance.

note: Single input: a plain-language Durable Object spec. The runbook turns it into a production DO + wrangler config + self-review.
